input.background: A filling station is supplied with gasoline once a week. Its weekly volume of sales in thousands of gallons is a random variable with probability density function $$ f(x)= \begin{cases}\frac{3}{2}\left(1-x^2\right) & 0 \leq x \leq 1 \\ 0 & \text { otherwise }\end{cases} $$.
input.question: What is the expected volume of sales in a given week? Show your work.
